title: [Skyship, Core]
description: The temperature cools as you progress deeper into the ship's core, with circular openings in the side bulkheads releasing chilled air.  Above, a giant rectangular container filled with an ethereal, highly viscous liquid, runs the length of the ceiling.  The liquid swirls as it changes color rapidly and repeatedly, passing through all colors in the rainbow in a single breath before it starts over.  As a result, the walkway is constantly cast in a shifting light.
